words: You have enough coins to upgrade the tower.
If the towers can't cope, use special abilities.
Save the passed waves in the pause menu with the "checkpoint" button, and in case of failures, return to them with "return". Have a nice game!

-The cannon deals the main damage 
-The machine gun will finish off the trucks
The sniper tower easily copes with infantry.
Slow down enemies in areas with high damage.
Please support the game with a review on its page!
Deals more damage than a regular machine gun.
The grenade launcher also deals damage to nearby enemies.
Radiation causes damage to all enemies in the affected area.
The laser cannon gradually increases the damage.
Get additional rewards after each level.
Machine gun is not enough, we need to build a cannon
We can also use a mine to destroy enemies.
